paragraphs: I have a passion for creating and bringing my ideas to life in expressive ways.
I love listening to music, finding niche artists, listening to albums and discovering new genres.

I like dancing and moving my body, expressing my feelings through movement and connecting with music in a physical way. Feeling the rhythm of a good song and the deepness of the artist throughout my body is one of the best feelings in the world.
I prefer learning things i'm interested in. When interest for something appears, i'm hooked. If there is no interest, it's hard for me to care.
I appreciate observing things, nature, the universe and everything in between. It's very fascinating how things work and how they are connected.
I enjoy paying attention to the small details in things, people and situations. I see that often the small details are the most interesting part of things.
I love loving, I love life, I love being.
